query:
SELECT cp.sellerId, s.name, cp.points, cp.salesCount, cp.competitionId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = cp.sellerId AND status = 'approved' AND competitionId = cp.competitionId) as vendas_competicao,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = cp.sellerId AND status = 'approved' AND competitionId = cp.competitionId) as pontos_competicao
FROM competition_participants cp
JOIN sellers s ON s.id = cp.sellerId
ORDER BY cp.points DESC

  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = cp.sellerId AND status = 'approved' AND competitionId = cp.competitionId) as pontos_competicao
FROM competition_participants cp
JOIN sellers s ON s.id = cp.sellerId
ORDER BY cp.points DESC
